questions.question: Which S3 storage class is cheapest for infrequent access?
questions.explanation: One Zone-IA is cheapest but lacks multi-AZ redundancy.

questions.question: Which services are serverless? (select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Lambda and DynamoDB require no server management.

questions.question: Answer the following questions about S3:

parts.question: S3 bucket names must be globally unique.
parts.explanation: Bucket names share a global namespace across all AWS accounts.

parts.question: What is the maximum object size in S3?
parts.explanation: The maximum object size in S3 is 5 terabytes.

questions.explanation: S3 is one of the foundational AWS services and a key topic on the SAA-C03 exam.

questions.question: What does IAM stand for?
questions.explanation: IAM controls who can do what in your AWS account.
